channel.title: Overview on Words of Life Library
channel.description: Recent content in Overview on Words of Life Library

item.title: Overview of Genesis: The Book of Beginnings
item.description: Adapted from insights by Ray C. Stedman and other biblical reflections_ A Story to Begin Imagine standing beneath a sky untouched by city lights, the stars stretching endlessly above you. In that quiet moment, the biggest questions rise to the surface: Where did everything come from? Why am I here? What is the meaning of all this? Genesis begins by stepping directly into that moment of awe. It does not offer speculation or mythic guesswork. It begins with a voice, clear, confident, and foundational:
